# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Reason

Explain why this change is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Build or tooling change
- [ ] Security or safety improvement

## Safety Impact

Does this change affect scanning, deletion, exclusions, duplicate detection, path handling, permissions, or user confirmation?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

If yes, describe the safety impact and how it was handled.

## Testing

Describe how this change was tested.

```text

```

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused on one clear change.
- [ ] I updated documentation for changed behavior, flags, commands, or safety rules.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior that could affect user data.
- [ ] I verified that destructive actions require explicit confirmation.
- [ ] I checked that protected paths and configured exclusions are respected.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, private paths, or personal data.

## Additional Notes

Add any extra context, screenshots, terminal output, or follow-up work.
